title: Muscular dystrophy - NHS
text:
pline Muscular Dystrophy UK: support groups Muscular Dystrophy UK: peer support Other organisations Other organisations offering support and information include:
Pathfinders Neuromuscular Alliance for people with muscle weakening conditions Duchenne UK for people with Duchenne muscular dystrophy and their families 
Recording information about you and your condition 
If you have muscular dystrophy, your care team will pass information on to the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service (NCARDRS) .
This helps scientists find better ways to treat and prevent this condition. You can opt out of the register at any time.
Page last reviewed: 5 June 2025
Next review due: 5 June 2028
